allow: Bash(python -c " import json, io, sys with open\(''5.AxonalSM_analysis/notebook/AxonMerge_Suite2p.ipynb'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: nb = json.load\(f\) out = [] out.append\(f''Total cells: {len\(nb[""cells""]\)}''\) for i, cell in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\): src = ''''.join\(cell[''source'']\) has_dist = ''dist_vec < max_distance'' in src uses_flag = ''use_max_distance'' in src out.append\(f''Cell {i}: dist_constraint={has_dist}, uses_flag={uses_flag}''\) with open\(''_cell_audit.txt'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f: f.write\(''\\n''.join\(out\)\) print\(''Written to _cell_audit.txt''\) ")
